[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010000 2
1 1110100 4
2 0010011 3
3 0001100 2
4 0001000 1
5 1111001 5
6 1101100 4
7 1111100 5

67 76 0010110 3
70 07 1111100 5 match 7

13 31 0001111 4

71 17 1100000 2

47 74 1101100 4 match 6
50 05 0110000 2
61 16 1110110 5
72 27 1000100 2

37 73 1101111 6
